pages.title: Fixed Level Structure
pages.text: All mobs in stronghold are exactly level 50:$(br2){$(br)  "structure": "minecraft:stronghold",$(br)  "level_mode": "fixed",$(br)  "fixed_level": 50,$(br)  "level_range": {$(br)    "min": 50,$(br)    "max": 50$(br)  },$(br)  "ignore_distance_scaling": true$(br)}

pages.title: Biome with Tags
pages.text: All nether biomes, high minimum level:$(br2){$(br)  "biome_tags": ["minecraft:is_nether"],$(br)  "priority": 100,$(br)  "level_range": {$(br)    "min": 30,$(br)    "max": 80$(br)  },$(br)  "level_mode": "distance",$(br)  "attribute_scaling": {$(br)    "minecraft:generic.max_health": {$(br)      "per_level": 0.5,$(br)      "operation": "addition"$(br)    }$(br)  }$(br)}
